Q00080:
SELECT
  T1.school_district
FROM FINREV_FED_17 AS T1
JOIN FINREV_FED_KEY_17 AS T2
  ON T1.state_code = T2.State_Code
JOIN NDECoreExcel_Math_Grade8 AS T3
  ON T2.State = T3.state
WHERE
  T3.average_scale_score IS NOT NULL AND T3.average_scale_score != 0
  AND T1.t_fed_rev IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY
  (T1.t_fed_rev * 1.0) / T3.average_scale_score DESC
LIMIT 1;

Q00077:
SELECT
  T2.State,
  AVG(T3.average_scale_score) AS average_math_score,
  SUM(T1.t_fed_rev) AS total_federal_revenue,
  SUM(T1.c14) AS federal_revenue_category_c14,
  SUM(T1.c25) AS federal_revenue_category_c25
FROM FINREV_FED_17 AS T1
INNER JOIN FINREV_FED_KEY_17 AS T2
  ON T1.state_code = T2.State_Code
INNER JOIN NDECoreExcel_Math_Grade8 AS T3
  ON T2.State = T3.state
GROUP BY
  T2.State
ORDER BY
  average_math_score DESC
LIMIT 10;

  ON T2.State = T3.state

SELECT

FROM FINREV_FED_KEY_17 AS fkey

  ON fkey.State_Code = ff.state_code
JOIN NDECoreExcel_Math_Grade8 AS nde
  ON fkey.State = nde.state
GROUP BY
  fkey.State
ORDER BY
  SUM(ff.t_fed_rev) ASC
LIMIT 1;

Q00078:
WITH MaxRevenues AS (
    -- Find the school(s) with the highest t_fed_rev
    SELECT
        school_district,
        state_code,
        t_fed_rev AS revenue_value,
        't_fed_rev' AS revenue_category
    FROM FINREV_FED_17
    WHERE t_fed_rev = (SELECT MAX(t_fed_rev) FROM FINREV_FED_17)

    UNION ALL

    -- Find the school(s) with the highest c14
    SELECT
        school_district,
        state_code,
        c14 AS revenue_value,
        'c14' AS revenue_category
    FROM FINREV_FED_17
    WHERE c14 = (SELECT MAX(c14) FROM FINREV_FED_17)

    UNION ALL

    -- Find the school(s) with the highest c25
    SELECT
        school_district,
        state_code,
        c25 AS revenue_value,
        'c25' AS revenue_category
    FROM FINREV_FED_17
    WHERE c25 = (SELECT MAX(c25) FROM FINREV_FED_17)
)
SELECT
    MR.school_district,
    MR.revenue_category,
    MR.revenue_value,
    ND.average_scale_score
FROM MaxRevenues AS MR
JOIN FINREV_FED_KEY_17 AS FFKEY
    ON MR.state_code = FFKEY.State_Code
JOIN NDECoreExcel_Math_Grade8 AS ND
    ON FFKEY.State = ND.state;

SELECT
  COUNT(player_id)

    player_award

    player_id
  HAVING
    COUNT(award_id) > 10
);
Q00012:
-- User Query: Which country first started using nuclear power plant(s)?
-- Key steps/corner-cases/knowledge/formula: Use a Common Table Expression (CTE) to find the minimum operational date that is not NULL, then select the country associated with that date.
WITH MinOperationalDate AS (
    SELECT
      MIN(OperationalFrom) AS EarliestDate
    FROM nuclear_power_plants
    WHERE
      OperationalFrom IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  Country
FROM nuclear_power_plants
WHERE
  OperationalFrom = (
    SELECT
      EarliestDate
    FROM MinOperationalDate
  );

FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT player_id
  FROM hall_of_fame

) AS T1
INNER JOIN player AS T2
  ON T1.player_id = T2.player_id
WHERE
  T2.birth_year IS NOT NULL AND T2.death_year IS NOT NULL;

Q00109:
WITH InductedPlayers AS (
  SELECT
    player_id
  FROM hall_of_fame
  WHERE
    inducted = 'Y'
)
SELECT
  T2.team_id,
  COUNT(DISTINCT IP.player_id) AS hall_of_fame_players_count
FROM InductedPlayers AS IP
JOIN salary AS T2
  ON IP.player_id = T2.player_id
GROUP BY
  T2.team_id
ORDER BY
  hall_of_fame_players_count DESC
LIMIT 10;

Q00108:
WITH OldestWinnerBirthYear AS (
    SELECT
        pa.award_id,
        MIN(p.birth_year) AS min_birth_year
    FROM
        player_award AS pa
    JOIN
        player AS p ON pa.player_id = p.player_id
    GROUP BY
        pa.award_id
)
SELECT
    ow.award_id,
    p.name_first,
    p.name_last
FROM
    OldestWinnerBirthYear AS ow
JOIN
    player_award AS pa ON ow.award_id = pa.award_id
JOIN
    player AS p ON pa.player_id = p.player_id AND ow.min_birth_year = p.birth_year
ORDER BY ow.award_id;

Q00107:
SELECT
  pa.award_id,
  p.name_first,
  p.name_last
FROM player_award AS pa
JOIN player AS p
  ON pa.player_id = p.player_id
WHERE
  (pa.award_id, p.birth_year) IN (
    SELECT
      award_id,
      MAX(p2.birth_year)
    FROM player_award AS pa2
    JOIN player AS p2
      ON pa2.player_id = p2.player_id
    GROUP BY
      award_id
  );

Q00137:
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN T1.OWNER_DESCR = 'PRIVATE' THEN 'Private'
    WHEN T1.OWNER_DESCR IN ('USFS', 'BIA', 'BLM', 'STATE', 'NPS') THEN 'Public'
  END AS land_type
FROM Fires AS T1
WHERE
  T1.OWNER_DESCR IN ('PRIVATE', 'USFS', 'BIA', 'BLM', 'STATE', 'NPS')
GROUP BY
  land_type
ORDER BY
  COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

Q00156:
WITH YearReleaseCounts AS (
  SELECT
    groupYear,
    COUNT(*) AS num_releases
  FROM torrents
  WHERE
    groupYear IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY
    groupYear
),
MinReleaseCount AS (
  SELECT
    MIN(num_releases) AS min_count
  FROM YearReleaseCounts
)
SELECT
  yrc.groupYear
FROM YearReleaseCounts AS yrc
JOIN MinReleaseCount AS mrc
  ON yrc.num_releases = mrc.min_count
ORDER BY
  yrc.groupYear ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  T1.releaseType
FROM torrents AS T1
GROUP BY

ORDER BY

LIMIT 1;

Q00166: SELECT artist FROM torrents WHERE releaseType = 'album' GROUP BY artist ORDER BY SUM(totalSnatched) DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT artist
FROM torrents
WHERE groupYear = 2015
GROUP BY artist
ORDER BY SUM(totalSnatched) DESC
LIMIT 1;
Q00168:
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN groupYear >= 2000 AND groupYear < 2010 THEN '2000s'
    WHEN groupYear < 2000 THEN 'before 2000'
    ELSE NULL
  END AS year_category,
  SUM(totalSnatched) AS downloaded_numbers
FROM torrents
GROUP BY
  year_category
HAVING
  year_category IS NOT NULL;

);

Q00161: SELECT artist FROM torrents GROUP BY artist ORDER BY COUNT(id) DESC LIMIT 1;
Q00143:
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN FIRE_YEAR >= 1990 AND FIRE_YEAR <= 1999 THEN '1990s'
    WHEN FIRE_YEAR >= 2000 AND FIRE_YEAR <= 2009 THEN '2000s'
  END AS Decade,
  SUM(FIRE_SIZE) AS Total_Acres_Burned
FROM Fires
WHERE
  FIRE_YEAR >= 1990 AND FIRE_YEAR <= 2009
GROUP BY
  Decade;

  T1.groupName,

FROM
  torrents AS T1
INNER JOIN

ON
  T1.id = T2.id;
Q00153:
SELECT groupName FROM (
    SELECT
        groupName,
        SUM(COALESCE(totalSnatched, 0)) AS calculatedPopularity
    FROM
        torrents
    WHERE
        artist = 'lasean camry'
    GROUP BY
        groupName
    ORDER BY
        calculatedPopularity DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
UNION ALL
SELECT groupName FROM (
    SELECT
        groupName,
        SUM(COALESCE(totalSnatched, 0)) AS calculatedPopularity
    FROM
        torrents
    WHERE
        artist = 'lasean camry'
    GROUP BY
        groupName
    ORDER BY
        calculatedPopularity ASC
    LIMIT 1
);

Q00152:
SELECT T1.groupName
FROM torrents AS T1
JOIN tags AS T2
  ON T1.id = T2.id
WHERE
  T2.tag = 'houston'
GROUP BY
  T1.groupName
ORDER BY
  SUM(T1.totalSnatched) DESC
LIMIT 1;
